description: CompositionBlue and white printed kurta with orange and grey accents, made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a hook opening, mock chest placket with silver tape detailing, short sleeves with grey band on the cuffs, grey tape detailing on the chest and hem, and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
